name: auth-screens
summary: Extra auth flows: passwordless OTP (email + SMS), password reset, onboarding. Extends the skeleton's auth.
postInstall: Extends the existing src/features/auth from Phase 2 (sign in/up already there).
Email OTP + password reset work on the Supabase free tier with NO extra keys.
SMS/phone OTP needs an SMS provider configured in the Supabase dashboard (Twilio/MessageBird) — a dashboard setting, not an app key.
Password reset: set the redirect URL in Supabase Auth settings (deep link) so the reset link returns to the app.
Wire screens to routes: <OtpScreen channel="phone" />, <ForgotPasswordScreen />, <OnboardingScreen />. Replace the UI after the Claude Design pass.
